_comment: Manually-maintained homepage values that are NOT part of the automated daily pipeline. Edit these by hand. nreFd = best NRE fixed-deposit rate shown in the sidebar (update from bank websites). bulletinReleases = known/estimated U.S. State Dept Visa Bulletin publication dates (ISO, ET); the sidebar shows days until the next one after today. The Visa Bulletin for a given month is published in the second week of the PRIOR month.
